name: Low-Fat Pesto
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh basil; loosely packed, wash, dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Start the food processor and add garlic to the feed tube. Process until finely chopped.
2. Add basil, onions, Parmesan, and pepper. Pulse on and off (about 6 times) until finely chopped.
3. Pour in olive oil and water. Process until well combined, scraping down sides with a spatula once or twice.
4. Makes about three-quarters of a cup. Use in Vegetarian Pesto Lasagna.
